scripts.name: generate_users
scripts.description: Generate random CSV file with user data (email, password, givenName, familyName) from names.csv

inputs.numRecords: integer, number of users to generate (>0)

scripts.notes: Reads from files/names.csv; uses fixed password 'Password123@'; dryRun would just validate params without writing file

scripts.name: create_users
scripts.description: Create users in Google Workspace from files/user_list.csv (requires Google API cred.json)

outputs.stdout: Log messages (creation status, progress, total created)

scripts.sideEffects: Creates users in Google Workspace; modifies Google org; persistent external impact
scripts.notes: HIGH-RISK: requires admin token, Google API credentials, and org access. No input params; reads from fixed CSV path. dryRun not feasible (would need mock Google API). Logs user creation to stdout.

scripts.name: delete_users
scripts.description: Delete all non-admin users from Google Workspace (lists users, filters out admin, deletes in batches)
scripts.sideEffects: Deletes all non-admin users from Google Workspace; permanent data loss; persistent external impact
scripts.notes: CRITICAL-RISK: permanent deletion. dryRun would list users to be deleted without actually deleting. Requires admin token and explicit approval.

scripts.name: send_gmail_api
scripts.description: Send emails using Google Gmail API from multiple user accounts (worker threads, quota-aware)

outputs.stdout: Log messages (sent count, email addresses, timestamps)

scripts.sideEffects: Sends bulk emails via Gmail API; external email delivery; logs to file
scripts.notes: Quota-aware (300 requests/email, 1.2M quota/min). Worker threads for parallelism. dryRun would validate CSV format and log count without sending.

scripts.name: extract_bounce_emails
scripts.description: Extract bounce/delivery-failure emails from Gmail and save to CSV (filters message snippets)

inputs.query: Gmail query (hardcoded to search bounce/failure messages)

scripts.sideEffects: Reads Gmail messages (read-only); writes CSV file
scripts.notes: Requires Gmail API access. dryRun would list emails to be extracted without writing file. adminOnly due to Gmail API credential sensitivity.

scripts.name: send_smtp
scripts.description: Send emails via SMTP using nodemailer (multi-threaded, quota-aware)
scripts.sideEffects: Sends bulk emails via SMTP; external email delivery; logs to file
scripts.notes: Multi-threaded email sending. dryRun would validate SMTP connections and count recipients without sending.

scripts.name: send_email_python
scripts.description: Send emails via SMTP using Python threading (reads CSV, sends with configured SMTP)
scripts.sideEffects: Sends bulk emails; logs to file; multi-threaded (50 emails/user per iteration)
scripts.notes: Python SMTP implementation. dryRun would validate CSV structure and log email counts without sending.

scripts.name: check_smtp
scripts.description: Validate SMTP connections concurrently (reads processed_users.csv, tests each SMTP server, exports working/non-working)

inputs.csvFile: files/processed_users.csv (SMTP credentials: smtp, port, email, password)

scripts.sideEffects: Network I/O (SMTP connections); overwrites output CSV files
scripts.notes: ThreadPoolExecutor with 1000 workers. dryRun would validate CSV schema and count records without testing SMTP.

scripts.name: split_by_domain
scripts.description: Split SMTP CSV by email domain (reads working_smtp.csv, creates per-domain CSVs)

outputs.csvFiles: <domain>.csv files (one per unique email domain, created in py/ dir)

scripts.sideEffects: Creates multiple CSV files in working directory
scripts.notes: Fast file I/O. dryRun would validate CSV structure and report domain count without creating files.

scripts.name: extract_unique_emails
scripts.description: Extract unique emails from users.csv (removes duplicates, exports to unique_data.csv)
scripts.notes: Simple set-based deduplication. dryRun would report unique count without writing file.

scripts.name: filter_unprocessed_emails
scripts.description: Find emails in user_list.csv not in unique_data.csv (set difference operation)
scripts.notes: Set difference operation (user_list - unique_data). dryRun would report count of unprocessed emails without writing file.

scripts.name: chunk_csv
scripts.description: Split CSV into chunks of configurable size (default 50k rows/chunk)

inputs.csvFile: input file (hardcoded in script or via stdin)

scripts.notes: Currently hardcoded paths; needs parameterization for input/output/chunkSize. dryRun would report chunk count without writing files.

scripts.name: activate_less_secure
scripts.description: Activate 'less secure app' access for Google accounts using Selenium (headless Chrome, multi-process)
scripts.sideEffects: Launches headless Chrome browser(s); modifies Google account settings; external side effects
scripts.notes: REQUIRES: chromedriver (auto-installed), Selenium, headless Chrome, user_list.csv with correct columns. Multi-process (multiprocessing.Pool). dryRun not feasible (web automation). HIGH-RISK: modifies 3rd-party accounts.
